subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Beauty of Abha! What thou hadst written was perused. I was informed of the details. His Holiness Christ said... Had each one of the beloved of God in America engaged in teaching the Cause of God, like unto the beloved in Persia, now they would have guided several millions of souls
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat]
